couldNotCompleteRequest: We couldn't complete that request. Try again.
pleaseLogInAgain: Please log in again to continue.
verificationEmailSent: We've sent a verification email. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verificationEmailSentTo: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verificationFailed: Email verification failed. The link may have expired.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter the email for your account and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPasswordSentHint: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link has been sent. The link expires in 1 hour.
resetPasswordDescription: Pick a new password of at least 6 characters. All active sessions will be signed out after you reset.
resetPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
resetPasswordTokenInvalid: This reset link is no longer valid
resetPasswordInvalidHint: The link may have expired, already been used, or never existed. Start over to receive a fresh one.
